app.name: Perfect World Helper
meta.description: Static helper for Perfect World players.
topbar.label: Interface preferences
home.title: Customizable components
home.description: Visual base for actions, navigation, fields, filters, menus, and helper pop-ups.
sections.buttons.title: Button / Link
sections.buttons.description: Action variations with size, intent, and state.
sections.inputs.title: Inputs / Select
sections.inputs.description: Fields with labels, help text, errors, required state, and extra attributes.
sections.toggles.title: Toggle / Switch / Tabs
sections.toggles.description: Controls for preferences, modes, and internal navigation.
sections.menus.title: Dropdown / Modal
sections.menus.description: Accessible menus and pop-ups with delegable actions.
fields.search.label: Search
search.hint: Use material, dungeon, or equipment names.
fields.quantity.label: Quantity
fields.invalidExample.label: Error example
fields.invalidExample.error: Enter a value greater than zero.
fields.notes.label: Notes
preferences.compactMode.description: Reduces spacing in lists and tables.
tabs.filters.description: Tab for search, dungeon, boss, class, and grade controls.
tabs.results.description: Tab for cards, tables, and calculated material lists.
tabs.history.description: Tab for recent calculations and local preferences.
modal.confirmCalculation.title: Confirm calculation
modal.confirmCalculation.description: Review the action before applying it.
modal.confirmCalculation.body: This modal already accepts HTML content rendered by the calling component. Dynamic text must arrive escaped.
footer.description: Built for quick lookups, deterministic calculations, and static GitHub Pages navigation.
features.divineBooks.description: Isolated area for Divine Book data, components, stores, and handlers.
features.duskDrops.description: Isolated area for Dusk drop filters, search, and grouping.
features.equipments.description: Isolated area for equipment lists and aggregated material calculation.
features.stones.description: Isolated area for deterministic stone calculation and estimated cost.
